name: WP-W3-entitlement-isolation: isolate entitlement + credit reads to the owning account
description: W3 — scope entitlement + credit reads to the owning person/org per the new tenancy model (MMT-ADR-0001/0002/0015): the same cross-account entitlement-leak pattern (RevenueCat entitlement + owner credit balance both leaking across the account/child boundary). Billing-math correctness is out of scope (W4).
acceptanceCriteria: Entitlement + credit balance never cross the account/child boundary; break-test attempting a child read of an owner's credit/entitlement. Findings: F-134 (RevenueCat cross-account leak), F-135 (owner credit leaked to child). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W3-entitlement-isolation (commit 23d0c01ad)
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W3-entitlement-isolation)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan §1 → "WP-W3-entitlement-isolation" @ 23d0c01ad — frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001): WI-612/613.
Bundle rationale
The same cross-account entitlement-leak pattern (RevenueCat entitlement + owner credit balance both leaking across the account/child boundary) on the new tenancy model.
Strategy
Scope entitlement + credit reads to the owning person/org per the new tenancy model (MMT-ADR-0001/0002/0015).
Scope
In: F-134 (RevenueCat cross-account leak), F-135 (owner credit leaked to child). Out: billing-math correctness (W4 / WI-583).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Entitlement + credit balance never cross the account/child boundary.
Break-test attempting a child read of an owner's credit/entitlement.
Risk & blast radius
S / standard — credit/entitlement boundary. Depends on WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574).
